mapper.select: SELECT h.homework_id, h.teaching_id, h.title AS homework_title, h.deadline, s.submission_id, #{studentId} AS student_id, s.submit_content, s.status, s.score, s.teacher_comment, s.submit_time, s.graded_time FROM biz_homework h LEFT JOIN biz_homework_submission s ON s.homework_id = h.homework_id AND s.student_id = #{studentId} AND s.del_flag = '0' WHERE h.teaching_id = #{teachingId} AND h.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY h.deadline ASC
